goal: Server-render card-page JSON-LD (was empty in raw HTML, JS-injected only)
done: Added injectCardSchema() to scripts/sync-card-static-seo.mjs (imports buildCardSchema from js/card-seo-schema.js): bakes the full JSON-LD (WebPage/BreadcrumbList/FAQPage/DefinedTerm) into the previously-empty #cardMeaningSchema <script> tag at build time, per card, EN+TH, escaping </ for safe inlining. Ran the sync -> populated all 156 /cards/ pages. Page JS still sets it at runtime (idempotent); crawlers now get structured data in raw HTML.
verified: grep: cards/death + th/cards/death have inline @types WebPage/BreadcrumbList/FAQPage/DefinedTerm/Question/Answer/ListItem; 156 pages carry schema; git diff is schema-only (empty tag -> filled); node --check passes.
